# M8 fault-harness manifest. GENERATED by m8gen. Do not edit.
# IDs are per-axis emitted case numbers (== co-sim Result=<ID>).

## D-side axis (m8_dside.S)
1    CAS.L Rm, Rn, @R0    General
2    LDC.L @Rm+, GBR      PrivMem
3    LDC.L @Rm+, SR       PrivMem
4    LDC.L @Rm+, VBR      PrivMem
5    LDS.L @Rm+, MACH     General
6    LDS.L @Rm+, MACL     General
7    LDS.L @Rm+, PR       PrivMem
8    MAC.L @Rm+, @Rn+     General    (3 positions report 1008/2008/3008: 1=op1-only,2=op2-only,3=both-cold)
9    MAC.W @Rm+, @Rn+     General    (3 positions report 1009/2009/3009: 1=op1-only,2=op2-only,3=both-cold)
10   MOV.B @(disp, Rm), R0 General
11   MOV.B @Rm+, Rn       General
12   MOV.B @Rm, Rn        General
13   MOV.B R0, @(disp, Rn) General
14   MOV.B Rm, @Rn        General
15   MOV.B Rm,@-Rn        General
16   MOV.L @(disp, Rm), Rn General
17   MOV.L @Rm+, Rn       General
18   MOV.L @Rm, Rn        General
19   MOV.L Rm, @(disp, Rn) General
20   MOV.L Rm, @Rn        General
21   MOV.L Rm,@-Rn        General
22   MOV.W @(disp, Rm), R0 General
23   MOV.W @Rm+, Rn       General
24   MOV.W @Rm, Rn        General
25   MOV.W R0, @(disp, Rn) General
26   MOV.W Rm, @Rn        General
27   MOV.W Rm,@-Rn        General
28   STC.L GBR, @-Rn      General
29   STC.L SR, @-Rn       PrivMem
30   STC.L VBR, @-Rn      PrivMem
31   STS.L MACH, @-Rn     General
32   STS.L MACL, @-Rn     General
33   STS.L PR, @-Rn       General
34   TAS.B @Rn            General
# 34 emitted; skipped:
#   ADD #imm, Rn         ADD #imm, Rn has no D-side memory access
#   ADD Rm, Rn           ADD Rm, Rn has no D-side memory access
#   ADDC Rm, Rn          ADDC Rm, Rn has no D-side memory access
#   ADDV Rm, Rn          ADDV Rm, Rn has no D-side memory access
#   AND #imm, R0         AND #imm, R0 has no D-side memory access
#   AND Rm, Rn           AND Rm, Rn has no D-side memory access
#   AND.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) AND.B #imm, @(R0, GBR): effective address not modelled: indexed @(R0,...) implicit R0 collides with the fixed base register (EA off the mapped page)
#   BF /S label          BF /S label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BF label             BF label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BGND                 BGND has no D-side memory access
#   BRA label            BRA label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BRAF Rm              BRAF Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BSR label            BSR label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BSRF Rm              BSRF Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BT /S label          BT /S label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BT label             BT label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   Break                Break has no D-side memory access

#   CMP/EQ.PTEH Rn       CMP/EQ.PTEH Rn has no D-side memory access

#   MOV.B R0, @(disp, GBR) MOV.B R0, @(disp, GBR): effective address not modelled: GBR-relative base is not seeded by the fixed register choice

## I-fetch axis (m8_ifetch_N.S)
1    ADD #imm, Rn         General
2    ADD Rm, Rn           General
3    ADDC Rm, Rn          General
4    ADDV Rm, Rn          General
5    AND #imm, R0         General
6    AND Rm, Rn           General
7    CLRT                 General
8    CMP /EQ #imm, R0     General
9    CMP /EQ Rm, Rn       General
10   CMP /GE Rm, Rn       General
11   CMP /GT Rm, Rn       General
12   CMP /HI Rm, Rn       General
13   CMP /HS Rm, Rn       General
14   CMP /STR Rm, Rn      General
15   CMP/PL Rn            General
16   CMP/PZ Rn            General

18   DIV0U                General
19   DIV1 Rm, Rn          General
20   DMULS.L Rm, Rn       General
21   DMULU.L Rm, Rn       General
22   DT Rn                General
23   EXTS.B Rm, Rn        General
24   EXTS.W Rm, Rn        General
25   EXTU.B Rm, Rn        General
26   EXTU.W Rm, Rn        General
27   LDS Rm, MACH         General
28   LDS Rm, MACL         General
29   MOV #imm, Rn         General
30   MOV Rm, Rn           General
31   MOVA @(disp, PC), R0 General
32   MOVT Rn              General
33   MUL.L Rm, Rn         General
34   MULS.W Rm, Rn        General
35   MULU.W Rm, Rn        General
36   NEG Rm, Rn           General
37   NEGC Rm, Rn          General
38   NOP                  General
39   NOT Rm, Rn           General
40   OR #imm, R0          General
41   OR Rm, Rn            General

45   ROTR Rn              General

47   SHAD Rm, Rn          General

49   SHAR Rn              General

53   SHLL2 Rn             General
54   SHLL8 Rn             General

62   STS PR, Rn           General

64   SUBC Rm, Rn          General
65   SUBV Rm, Rn          General

67   SWAP.W Rm, Rn        General
68   TST #imm, R0         General
69   TST Rm, Rn           General
70   XOR #imm, R0         General
71   XOR Rm, Rn           General
72   XTRACT Rm, Rn        General
# 72 emitted; skipped:
#   AND.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) AND.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   BF /S label          BF /S label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BF label             BF label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BGND                 BGND: SH-2A BGND not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   BRA label            BRA label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BRAF Rm              BRAF Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BSR label            BSR label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BSRF Rm              BSRF Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BT /S label          BT /S label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   BT label             BT label is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   Break                Break is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   CAS.L Rm, Rn, @R0    CAS.L Rm, Rn, @R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   CLDS CP0_Rm, CP0_COM CLDS CP0_Rm, CP0_COM: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   CLDS CPI_Rm, CPI_COM CLDS CPI_Rm, CPI_COM: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   CLRMAC               CLRMAC: clrmac microcoded as TEMP1^TEMP1 -> 'U'/'X' in sim (MAC snapshot not comparable)
#   CMP/EQ.ASID Rn       CMP/EQ.ASID Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   CMP/EQ.PTEH Rn       CMP/EQ.PTEH Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   CSTS CP0_COM, CP0_Rn CSTS CP0_COM, CP0_Rn: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   CSTS CPI_COM, CPI_Rn CSTS CPI_COM, CPI_Rn: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   Error                Error is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   General Illegal      General Illegal is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   Interrupt            Interrupt is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   JMP @Rm              JMP @Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   JSR @Rm              JSR @Rm is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   LDC Rm, ASIDR        LDC Rm, ASIDR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, PTEH         LDC Rm, PTEH writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, PTEL         LDC Rm, PTEL writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, Rn_BANK      LDC Rm, Rn_BANK writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, SPC          LDC Rm, SPC writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, SR           LDC Rm, SR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, SSR          LDC Rm, SSR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC Rm, VBR          LDC Rm, VBR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC, Rm, GBR         LDC, Rm, GBR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDC.L @Rm+, GBR      LDC.L @Rm+, GBR accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDC.L @Rm+, SR       LDC.L @Rm+, SR accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDC.L @Rm+, VBR      LDC.L @Rm+, VBR accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDS Rm, CP0_COM      LDS Rm, CP0_COM: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   LDS Rm, CPI_COM      LDS Rm, CPI_COM: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   LDS Rm, PR           LDS Rm, PR writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   LDS.L @Rm+, MACH     LDS.L @Rm+, MACH accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDS.L @Rm+, MACL     LDS.L @Rm+, MACL accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDS.L @Rm+, PR       LDS.L @Rm+, PR accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   LDTLB                LDTLB is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   LDTLB.RN             LDTLB.RN is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   MAC.L @Rm+, @Rn+     MAC.L @Rm+, @Rn+ accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MAC.W @Rm+, @Rn+     MAC.W @Rm+, @Rn+ accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B @(R0, Rm), Rn  MOV.B @(R0, Rm), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B @(disp, GBR), R0 MOV.B @(disp, GBR), R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B @(disp, Rm), R0 MOV.B @(disp, Rm), R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B @Rm+, Rn       MOV.B @Rm+, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B @Rm, Rn        MOV.B @Rm, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B R0, @(disp, GBR) MOV.B R0, @(disp, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B R0, @(disp, Rn) MOV.B R0, @(disp, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B Rm, @(R0, Rn)  MOV.B Rm, @(R0, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B Rm, @Rn        MOV.B Rm, @Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.B Rm,@-Rn        MOV.B Rm,@-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @(R0, Rm), Rn  MOV.L @(R0, Rm), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @(disp, GBR), R0 MOV.L @(disp, GBR), R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @(disp, PC), Rn MOV.L @(disp, PC), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @(disp, Rm), Rn MOV.L @(disp, Rm), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @Rm+, Rn       MOV.L @Rm+, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L @Rm, Rn        MOV.L @Rm, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L R0, @(disp, GBR) MOV.L R0, @(disp, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L Rm, @(R0, Rn)  MOV.L Rm, @(R0, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L Rm, @(disp, Rn) MOV.L Rm, @(disp, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L Rm, @Rn        MOV.L Rm, @Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.L Rm,@-Rn        MOV.L Rm,@-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @(R0, Rm), Rn  MOV.W @(R0, Rm), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @(disp, GBR), R0 MOV.W @(disp, GBR), R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @(disp, PC), Rn MOV.W @(disp, PC), Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @(disp, Rm), R0 MOV.W @(disp, Rm), R0 accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @Rm+, Rn       MOV.W @Rm+, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W @Rm, Rn        MOV.W @Rm, Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W R0, @(disp, GBR) MOV.W R0, @(disp, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W R0, @(disp, Rn) MOV.W R0, @(disp, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W Rm, @(R0, Rn)  MOV.W Rm, @(R0, Rn) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W Rm, @Rn        MOV.W Rm, @Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   MOV.W Rm,@-Rn        MOV.W Rm,@-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   OR.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) OR.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   RTE                  RTE is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   RTS                  RTS is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   Reset CPU            Reset CPU is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   SLEEP                SLEEP is Bespoke (dedicated guard)
#   STC ASIDR, Rn        STC ASIDR, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC EXPEVT, Rn       STC EXPEVT, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC INTEVT, Rn       STC INTEVT, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC PTEH, Rn         STC PTEH, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC PTEL, Rn         STC PTEL, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC Rm_BANK, Rn      STC Rm_BANK, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC SPC, Rn          STC SPC, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC SR, Rn           STC SR, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC SSR, Rn          STC SSR, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC TRA, Rn          STC TRA, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC TSBPTR, Rn       STC TSBPTR, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC VBR, Rn          STC VBR, Rn writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   STC.L GBR, @-Rn      STC.L GBR, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   STC.L SR, @-Rn       STC.L SR, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   STC.L VBR, @-Rn      STC.L VBR, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   STS CP0_COM, Rn      STS CP0_COM, Rn: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   STS CPI_COM, Rn      STS CPI_COM, Rn: coprocessor instruction (CP0/CPI) not implemented by the J-core DUT
#   STS.L MACH, @-Rn     STS.L MACH, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   STS.L MACL, @-Rn     STS.L MACL, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   STS.L PR, @-Rn       STS.L PR, @-Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   Slot Illegal         Slot Illegal is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TAS.B @Rn            TAS.B @Rn accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   TLB DMISS R          TLB DMISS R is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TLB DMISS W          TLB DMISS W is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TLB DPROT R          TLB DPROT R is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TLB DPROT W          TLB DPROT W is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TLB IMISS            TLB IMISS is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TLB IPROT            TLB IPROT is a microcode-only system entry (plane=system), not a fetchable instruction
#   TRAPA #imm           TRAPA #imm writes/needs a control register; I-fetch axis tests fetch-restart precision on the General non-memory set (PrivMem ctrl side-effects need benign-init/restore across the in-page fetch)
#   TST.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) TST.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
#   XOR.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) XOR.B #imm, @(R0, GBR) accesses memory; I-fetch axis is fetch-only (data-access precision is covered by the D-side axis + mmuirun mixed leg)
